feedback.text: Dear Representatives,Lawmakers I decided to write feedback because i'm concerned about what has been happening in the gaming industry. Time and time again game publishers have left already purchased games in an unplayable state. I really wish that this act would include a point along the lines of publishers having to either create their games in a way that leaves them playable after they end support or publish resources from which the community could keep running them on it's own. Another concern i have is specifically with nintendo which has been banning already purchased switch 2 consoles from online services because of the use of third party accessories/tools. For example the use of cartridges that by themselves could hold multiple games instead of having to carry around 10+ cartridges. They essentially do this under the guise of fighting piracy when in fact these third party items are used by many with legally aquired nintendo games and they ban them without verifying the softwares legitimacy. I think this is extremely anti competitive towards the makers of these accessories/tools and also hostile towards consumers.
